hero.title: Welcome to AClimate {{country}}
hero.subtitle: Explore, monitor, and compare satellite data. Learn how climate has behaved across regions.

about.ctaSubtitle: Access detailed climate information and advanced analysis tools

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.subtitle: Stations saved as favorites.
favorites.empty: You don't have favorite stations yet.

profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account information and preferences.
profile.name: Name
profile.modalSubtitle: Select the profile type that best describes your role on the platform.
profile.roleFarmerDescription: Person dedicated to agricultural production who uses climate information for crop decisions.
profile.roleTechnicianDescription: Professional or technician specialized in agricultural advisory, rural extension, or climate analysis.

cookies.message: We use cookies to measure site usage with Google Analytics. If you accept, we will enable Analytics. If you reject, Google Analytics will not load.

weather.signInPrompt: Sign in to view your favorite stations
weather.exploreMap: Explore the map to add favorites

alerts.loginRequired: You must sign in to manage favorites
alerts.alreadyFavorite: This station is already in favorites
alerts.favoriteError: Error updating favorites. Please try again.

header.description: Explore climate data and indicators for {{country}} and see how it has changed over time. Use this view to identify patterns, vulnerable areas, and download the information you need for your analysis.

uses.item1: See how these indicators vary across regions
uses.item2: Identify agricultural areas with higher climate risk
uses.item3: Download raster data for specialized analysis

climateData.description: This section brings together the main climate variables for the country in interactive map format. Explore each variable to understand how conditions change across the territory and use the date to compare different moments in time.

empty.layers: No layers available for the selected period.
empty.variable: No data available for this variable
empty.indicators: No data available for this temporality and category combination
empty.agroIndicators: No data available for this agroclimatic category

pctChange.title: Monthly forecast percent change
pctChange.description: This map shows the percent change in the monthly climate forecast across the territory. Use the timeline to explore how changes vary between months.

monthly.title: Monthly climate forecast
monthly.description: This map shows monthly climate scenarios to identify expected conditions in each area. Navigate months with the timeline to compare trends.

indicators.description: Explore climate patterns and extremes across the country throughout the year. Select temporality and category to visualize the indicators that best fit your analysis.

agro.description: Explore the available agroclimatic indicators to identify conditions relevant to crop management and territorial planning.

hydrological.title: Hydrological indicators
hydrological.description: Explore hydrological indicators at the micro-watershed level for your community. Select your location to view available data on erosion, floods, and more.

errors.noFiles: Could not get the files to download.
errors.downloadAll: An error occurred while downloading the files. Please try again.
errors.downloadOne: An error occurred while downloading the file. Please try again.

variableInfo.tmax: Maximum temperature represents the highest air temperature value in a day, measured in degrees Celsius (°C).
variableInfo.prec: Precipitation is the total amount of water that falls on the surface, measured in millimeters (mm). It includes rain, snow, hail, etc.
variableInfo.tmin: Minimum temperature represents the lowest air temperature value in a day, measured in degrees Celsius (°C).
variableInfo.rad: Solar radiation is the amount of radiant energy received from the sun per unit area, measured in megajoules per square meter (MJ/m²).
variableInfo.et0: Evapotranspiration is the loss of water from the soil via evaporation and plant transpiration, measured in millimeters (mm).

variableDescriptions.prec: This map shows rainfall distribution across the territory for the selected date. Explore the colored areas to learn precipitation levels and use the timeline to explore other days.
variableDescriptions.tmax: See how maximum temperature behaves across different regions of the country. Move around the map to view values by area and adjust the date to compare changes over time.
variableDescriptions.tmin: See how temperatures drop across different areas during the selected date. Use the map to identify areas with colder nights and compare changes by moving through dates.
variableDescriptions.rad: This map shows how much solar energy each region receives. Explore the colors to identify areas with more or less radiation and adjust the date to see how it varies over time.
variableDescriptions.et0: Observe how much water vapor is lost from soil and vegetation in each area. Move across the map to identify areas with higher water demand and use the timeline to analyze daily patterns.

scenarioPage.title: Climate Scenarios
scenarioPage.description: Welcome! Here you can explore your region's climate scenario. Search and click anywhere on the map, or use the selectors to choose a department and community. You will discover key features and the best recommendations for the proposed scenario.

sections.recommendationsDescription: Based on climate scenarios and precipitation probabilities

empty.featuresSelectCommunity: Select a community to view its features.
empty.featuresNoData: No features available for this area.
empty.recommendationsSelectCommunity: Select a community to view recommendations.
empty.recommendationsNoData: No recommendations available for this area.

errors.downloadRaster: An error occurred while downloading the layer. Please try again.

header.descriptionSuffix: providing key information for agroclimatic monitoring.

climate.description: Explore how the main climate variables have changed at this station. View trends in temperature, precipitation, and solar radiation. Use date filters to adjust the information to your needs.

indicators.description: Review the evolution of this station's climate indicators and discover relevant patterns. Easily filter by category and date range to customize your analysis.

warnings.dateRangeTooLarge: ⚠️ The selected range is too large (more than 3 years). Please select a shorter period.

empty.noClimateData: No climate data available for the selected period

tooltips.loginRequiredFavorite: You must sign in to add favorites
